name: Nakamichi FDSK530A PRO — Fidela by Nakamichi DSP Power Amplifier (8-IN / 10-OUT)
description:
Elevate your car’s audio performance with this high-end DSP power amplifier from Nakamichi’s premium Fidela series — engineered for audiophiles and serious sound enthusiasts looking to unlock precise, powerful, and fully customizable audio tuning in their vehicle. This advanced processor-amp combo combines digital signal processing (DSP) with multi-channel output flexibility and rich connectivity for the ultimate in-car listening experience.

 

Superior Sound Configuration & Control

  • Max Power Output: Up to 8 × 70W for evenly balanced performance across all channels.

  • Input Flexibility: Supports high-level (speaker level) and low-level (RCA) signals — ideal for both factory and aftermarket systems.

  • Wide Frequency Response: 20 Hz–20 kHz range with fine 1 Hz EQ resolution for rich lows, clear mids, and detailed highs.

  • 32-Band EQ Per Channel: Customize every detail of your audio with professional level tuning, including adjustable gain, filters, phase, and time alignment.

  • Multiple Input Options: Works with internal Bluetooth, USB, optical, and coaxial sources for versatile audio playback

 

Professional-Grade Audio Customization

With its comprehensive DSP features — including time alignment, phase control, professional crossover types (Butterworth, Bessel, Link-Riley), and multiple signal presets— this amplifier empowers you to sculpt your car sound meticulously. Save your custom settings with multiple presets for different listening scenarios.

 

Ideal For Advanced Car Audio Systems

Designed for complex multi-speaker setups — from full 3-way systems to active crossover configurations with subwoofers — the FDSK530A PRO gives you the control and power needed to extract maximum performance from every speaker in your vehicle.

name: Pioneer TS-A1608C Component Speaker 350W
description:
Elevate your car audio experience with the Pioneer TS‑A1608C — a premium component speaker set engineered to deliver crisp highs, solid mids and rich bass in even the most demanding in‑vehicle environments.

Key Features

  • 6.5″ woofer + separate tweeter component system, designed for optimal stereo staging and clarity.

  • High maximum power: 350 W peak and 80 W RMS (nominal) — giving the system plenty of headroom for dynamic playback. 

  • Wide frequency response: approximately 33 Hz to 58 kHz — enabling the system to reproduce deep bass and extend well into the treble range. 

  • Sensitivity around 90 dB and standard 4‑ohm impedance – meaning it can play loud and works with most aftermarket head units and amplifiers.

  • Sturdy build with a Carbon & Mica Reinforced IMPP™ cone woofer and Elastic Polymer surround, delivering improved response, rigidity and reduced distortion. 

  • “Open & Smooth” sound concept: Pioneer’s design philosophy to ensure smoother transitions between woofer and tweeter and a wide, even soundstage to offset typical car‑cab‑speaker positioning issues.

  • Installation‑friendly design: woofer mounting depth of ~59 mm and cut‑out diameter ~144 mm making it compatible with many 6.5″ speaker mounting locations.

  • Size: 16.5 cm (6.5″) woofer + 20 mm tweeter (approx)

name: Blaupunkt Active Down Firing Subwoofer TXb 2002A - 1000 Watts Compact 8” Dual Subwoofer
description:
Blaupunkt TXb-2002A Active Down-Firing Subwoofer — Powerful Bass, Clean Control

Experience deep, punchy low frequencies with the Blaupunkt TXb-2002A Active Down-Firing Subwoofer — engineered for true bass lovers and car audio enthusiasts. Designed with a built-in Class D amplifier and modern bass control features, this subwoofer delivers rich, distortion-free sound with precision and authority.

Key Features

 

  • 8″ Down-Firing Subwoofer — delivers robust bass that fills your cabin
  • Integrated 200 W RMS / 600 W Peak Power Amplifier — high output for strong performance
  • Class D Amplifier — efficient and clean power delivery
  • Frequency Response (Amp): 10 Hz – 180 Hz — deep bass range coverage
  • Speaker Frequency Response: 45 Hz – 3 kHz — balanced low to mid output
  • Variable Low Pass Filter (40 Hz–180 Hz) — tune your bass exactly how you like it
  • Phase Switch (0°–180°) — easily syncs sub output with your main speakers
  • Signal Input Options — Low Level (RCA) / High Level L/R for flexible connections
  • Tone Controls — adjustable Gain & Bass Boost (0 to –12 dB at 30–80 Hz)
  • Subsonic Filter (10 Hz–50 Hz) — protects speaker from unwanted ultra-low signals
  • Visual Indicators — power & protect LEDs for quick status feedback
  • External Bass Controller Included — adjust bass on the fly from the driver seat
  • 40 A Fuse Protection — safeguards your subwoofer system

 

Why Choose Blaupunkt TXb-2002A for Your Car?

The Blaupunkt TXb-2002A integrates a powerful amplifier with a precision-tuned 8″ subwoofer to deliver rich, controlled bass without distortion. Whether you listen to hip-hop, EDM, rock, or cinematic soundtracks, this active down-firing sub brings fuller low end and immersive sound to every ride.

Perfect for:

  • Upgrading factory audio systems
  • Bass-focused car audio builds
  • Drivers who want powerful, reliable sound with easy tuning

Installation & Compatibility

With both low-level (RCA) and high-level inputs, the TXb-2002A is compatible with most aftermarket head units and stock stereos. The included external bass controller lets you fine-tune your bass level without touching the main unit.

 

 

What’s in the Box

 

  • Blaupunkt TXb-2002A Dual 8” Subwoofer with Built-In Amplifier
  • External Bass Level Controller
  • Mounting Hardware
  • User Manual

Built for durability, the amplifier uses dual 20A fuses for protection and features a solid construction with a net weight of approximately 2.8kg. Its compact yet robust dimensions (355 × 217 × 55 mm) make it suitable for boot or under-seat installations depending on vehicle space.

name: JBL Basspro SL2 8" Class D Compact Underseat Subwoofer with Bass Controller (125W RMS)
description:
Size: 8 inches
Channel Output: 1/Mono Channel
Total RMS Wattage: 125 Watts 
Impedance: 4 ohms
Warranty: 1 Year Brand Warranty

The BassPro SL2 self-powered subwoofer fits under the front seat of many vehicles, and adds deep full rich bass to your existing audio system. Its shallow-profile, 8" woofer is coupled with a custom tuned enclosure and is driven by a powerful Class D digital amplifier which making it a powerful solution. A fully variable crossover and Bass EQ are on-board to tune the BassPro SL2 to your system.
Proprietary, shallow-profile woofer
The 8" (200mm) woofer in the BassPro SL2 is designed specifically to provide low distortion and great bass performance in an ABS enclosure with a remarkably compact footprint.
 
Efficient Class D amplifier
The amp that powers the BassPro SL2 produces minimal heat, and it doesn’t require a lot of current from the car’s electrical system.
 
Intelligent electronic design
The BassPro SL2 employs high-pass filters and limiters that deliver exceptional at-the-limits performance.
 
Crossover control
A manual crossover control (50Hz – 120Hz) lets you adjust how much upper bass and mid-bass the BassPro SL2 produces. Fine-tune the crossover to achieve a smooth transition from the BassPro SL2 to the rest of the system’s speakers.
 
Flexible EQ adjustments
Level control adjusts the BassPro SL2’s volume to the other speakers in your system, while Bass Boost control lets you minimize peaks or dips in bass frequencies in your car’s acoustic environment.
 
Line- and high-level inputs
For added installation flexibility, the BassPro SL2 features both line- and high-level inputs. If you use the high-level inputs to connect the BassPro SL2 to the head unit, an input load switch lets you switch from “Low” to “High” to achieve optimum results.
 
Wired, remote level control capability
The BassPro SL2 is compatible with the JBL GTO-RBC included, which enables you to control the bass level remotely.

  • Amplifier Power: 125W RMS

name: Infinity Primus PR6512ISHI 6.5" Coaxial Speakers (55W RMS 165W Peak)
description:
SPECIFICATIONS : 

New Primus speakers feature our patented Plus One polypropylene woofers which feature more radiating cone area for increased output and edge-driven tweeters for better high frequency dispersion. Speakers are super clear at the top with vocals, horns and strings and deliver big bass with plenty of slam. Long story short: superior sound top to bottom. True 4 ohm architecture gives the amplifier room to reach peak power for increased depth and detail.

There are seven Primus models for easy installation in any vehicle, whether it's a truck, compact or limo. In addition to passing demanding reliability and environmental testing, all speakers are individually voiced by some of the world's best transducer engineers to authenticate the Infinity sound. It's not a coincidence that Infinity is one of the world's top-selling car audio speaker brands.

  • Patented Plus One Polypropylene Woofers : Polypropylene cones with up to 35% more radiating cone area than other cones in the same class provide higher sensitivity, increased low frequency output and better tonal balance. Hi-roll rubber surrounds using automotive grade materials result in cleaner reproduction and higher durability whether it's easy listening or time to show and shine.
  • Edge-Driven Tweeters : Edge-driven tweeters deliver wider dispersion and smoother high frequency response with increased power handling for high- and mid-frequencies.
  • True 4 Ohm Architecture : True 4 ohm architecture with low impedance voice coils give the amplifier room to deliver peak power providing stronger and clearer sound with better depth and detail.
  • Harman Standard Reliability Testing : Infinity speakers have to undergo a testing process that would destroy lesser speakers. Infinity freezes them, bakes them, shakes them, blasts them with ultraviolet light and drives them at full power for days at a time.
  • Voicing of Speakers : Speakers are individually voiced to assure high quality audio versus “off-the-shelf” manufactured sound. This means that specifications as well as speaker characteristics are considered when tuning the Infinity sound.
  • Infinity at an Affordable Price : This is Infinity—one of the most innovative and legendary companies in audio. Infinity is one of the top-selling car speaker brands in the world—obviously, this is no coincidence.

name: JBL Club A754 4-Channel Amplifier (4x 75W)
description:
JBL Club A754 4-Channel Amplifier (4x 75W)

4 x 75 Watts RMS or 2 x 100 Watts RMS

High performance 4 channel car amplifier

Value engineered car amplifier with JBL power and performance.


The Club A754 4-channel amplifier delivers a powerful 75-Watts RMS to each of the front and rear speakers in your car. You can also bridge the amp to 2-channel mode to drive a couple subs with 200 watts RMS or 3-channel mode to drive both a pair of full range speakers and a subwoofer. Speaker-level inputs allow this amplifier to integrate into almost any system, even one using your car’s factory radio. Separate high-pass and low-pass crossovers on the front and rear channels allow you dial in the perfect roll off to best suit speaker placement and cabin acoustics.

 

Features and Benefits

  1. Compact size : The JBL Club A754 amplifier features a low-profile chassis and a small overall footprint to fit in more vehicles where available space is limited.
  2. High and low level input : Speaker-level and low-level inputs allow the Club A754 to integrate with both aftermarket and factory car stereo systems.
  3. Variable crossover : Unlike many amplifiers available at similar prices, the JBL Club A754 features variable electronic crossovers for precise system tuning and performance.
  4. Low noise and distortion : The Club A754 has been engineered using Balanced Differential Inputs to ensure low noise and distortion even at high output levels. This also makes it far less susceptible to line induced engine noise.
  5. Input Level Control :When low-level inputs are used, this control adjusts the input sensitivity between 200mVrms and 2.0 Vrms. When high-level inputs are used, this control adjusts the input sensitivity between 2Vrms and 20Vrms.
  6. Full on-board protection : On-board circuitry protects the Club A754 from shorts, high-temperature, overvoltage and undervoltage. An LED indicator is provided to let you know when one of these conditions exists.
  7. Preamp Outputs : Using multiple amplifiers, the Club A754 has full range preamp outputs allowing you to feed an additional amplifier without using splitters.
  8. Class H amp technology :The JBL Club A754 4 channels subwoofer amplifier delivers 400-Watts RMS using a Class H amplifier design to ensure high output and minimum current draw.
  9. Turn-on mode : This switch changes DC to REM to adapt with low-level signals or high-level signals, this is especially helpful as part of remote turn-on lead of your installation more choice. A selectable “Turn-on mode” can protect battery to avoid current drain, when you don’t expect to turn on your amplifier.


Technical specifications:

  • 4 channel car amplifier
  • 75 watts RMS x 4 at 4 ohms
  • (100 watts RMS x 4 at 2 ohms)
  • 200 watts RMS x 2 at 4 ohms in bridged mode (4-ohm stable in bridged mode)
  • Variable high- and low-pass filters
  • (32–320Hz, 12dB/octave) on front and
  • rear channels
  • Preamp and speaker-level inputs
  • Preamp outputs
  • Fuse rating: 30A x 2
  • 8-gauge power and ground leads recommended – wiring and hardware not included with amplifier
  • W x H x D = 320mm x 51.3mm x 180mm
  • W x H x D = 12-5/8'' x 2-1/16'' x 7-1/8''

Protect your car speakers from water, dust, and distortion with the high-quality Ferry Rain Gaurd Speaker Ring Guard. Designed using durable ABS plastic, this product ensures long-lasting performance and excellent protection for your audio system.

Built for universal compatibility, the Rain Gaurd fits most 6” and 6.5” speakers available in the market, making it an ideal choice for upgrading or safeguarding your car’s sound setup.

 

Key Features

  • High-Quality ABS Plastic: Strong, durable and heat-resistant for long-term performance.
  • Universal Fit: Perfectly compatible with most aftermarket and OEM speakers.
  • Enhanced Protection: Prevents water entry, improves speaker life, and reduces vibration.
  • Available Sizes: Suitable for 6-inch and 6.5-inch speakers.
  • Reliable Build Quality: Made using premium materials for a secure and professional installation.

 

 PROPER FIT SPEAKER COUPLER 

  • Perfect OE-Style Fit – Designed to match most standard speaker terminals for a snug and reliable fit.
  • Improved Sound Quality – Ensures proper current flow, reducing distortion and power loss.
  • Easy Installation – Plug-and-play type fitment, no or splicing required in most setups.
  • Secure Locking Grip – Tight coupling minimizes chances of loose contact over rough roads.
  • Durable Build – Made from high-quality, heat-resistant material for long life and stable performance.

 

 

This package is inclusive of 1 pair Rain Guard and 1 pair Proper Fit Speaker Coupler

name: Morel MPD4.100 4 Channel amplifier
description:
MPD4.100: Space-Saving Excellence

Elevate your driving experience with the Morel MPD 4.100 Amplifier, combining compact design with robust performance. It offers 115W x 4 at 4 ohms and 165W x 4 at 2 ohms, with a bridging output of 330W x 2 at 4 ohms. It features a wide frequency response of 20Hz to 30kHz and a Signal-to-Noise ratio over 93dB. Fine-tune your audio with variable high-pass and low-pass crossovers (50-300Hz, 12dB slope) and enjoy pure sound with a Total Harmonic Distortion (THD) below 0.2%. The advanced protection circuit ensures safety and durability, making the MPD4.100 ideal for car audio enthusiasts who demand both quality and space efficiency.

Key Features Across All Morel MPD Amplifiers:

• Impressive Clarity: Wide frequency response of 20Hz to 30kHz and Signal-to-Noise ratio over 93dB ensure superior audio quality.

• Compact and Powerful: Space-saving designs with robust power outputs suitable for any vehicle. These amplifiers can be discreetly tucked away, yet they deliver remarkable power without consuming valuable space.

name: NAKAMICHI NAM5260 4GB RAM 64GB STORAGE ANDROID CAR STEREO
description:
Nakamichi NAM5260 Car Multimedia System – 4GB RAM | 64GB Storage

 

The Nakamichi NAM5260 is a feature-rich smart car multimedia system designed for smooth performance, reliable connectivity, and enhanced audio control. Running on NK 12.0 system, it supports direct Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, allowing seamless smartphone integration without unnecessary complexity.

Equipped with 4GB RAM and 64GB internal storage, the system ensures responsive touch operation, stable multitasking, and sufficient space for apps and media. The capacitive touchscreen with 1280 × 720 resolution and 500 nits brightness delivers clear visuals and good visibility in varied lighting conditions.

For audio performance, the NAM5260 provides a 50W × 4 max power output, supported by a 32-band equalizer with 6 preset modes, enabling detailed sound tuning. With 2.0 and 2.1 pre-out options, including a dedicated subwoofer output, it integrates easily with external amplifiers and upgraded speaker systems.

The unit supports a wide range of audio and video formats, ensuring smooth playback of music and videos. It also supports AHD 1080P rear camera input, making it compatible with high-resolution parking and reverse cameras for improved safety.

With multiple AV inputs, subwoofer support, and phone link compatibility for selected Android and iOS devices, the Nakamichi NAM5260 offers a balanced combination of performance, sound quality, and daily usability.

 

Key Features

 

 

  • NK 12.0 operating system
  • 4GB RAM + 64GB internal storage
  • Direct Apple CarPlay & Android Auto support
  • 1280 × 720 capacitive touchscreen (500 nits brightness)
  • 50W × 4 maximum power output
  • 32-band EQ with 6 presets
  • Subwoofer support with 2.1 pre-out
  • AHD 1080P camera compatibility
  • Wide audio & video format support

Supported Formats

Video: H264, MP4, AVI, MKV, FLV

Audio: MP3, APE, AAC, FLAC
